member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Workers.Activation.BrandingDiscovery.BrandingDiscoveryWorker
member.summary: Pure-compute worker that extracts a BrandingKit from website HTML and email signatures. Deterministic CSS/font parsing does NOT call Claude; Claude is used only for template recommendation and brand conflict resolution. NO storage, NO DataServices.

Pure-compute worker that extracts a BrandingKit from website HTML and email signatures. Deterministic CSS/font parsing does NOT call Claude; Claude is used only for template recommendation and brand conflict resolution. NO storage, NO DataServices.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Workers.Activation.BrandingDiscovery.BrandingDiscoveryWorker.ColorPropertyRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
(?:color|background-color|background)\\s*:\\s*(#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8}|rgb\\([^)]+\\))
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase | RegexOptions.Compiled
Explanation:
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Ll].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Rr].
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Bb].
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Kk\u212A].
○ Match a character in the set [Gg].
○ Match a character in the set [Rr].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Uu].
○ Match a character in the set [Nn].
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Dd].
○ Match '-'.
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Ll].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Rr].
○ Match a character in the set [Dd].
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match ':'.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions, atomically.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match an empty string.
○ Match a character in the set [0-9A-Fa-f] atomically at least 3 and at most 8 times.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match an empty string.
○ Match a character in the set [Gg].
○ Match a character in the set [Bb].
○ Match '('.
○ Match a character other than ')' atomically at least once.
○ Match ')'.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Workers.Activation.BrandingDiscovery.BrandingDiscoveryWorker.FontFamilyRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
font-family\\s*:\\s*([^;}{]+)
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase | RegexOptions.Compiled
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [Ff].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Nn].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match '-'.
○ Match a character in the set [Ff].
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Mm].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Ll].
○ Match a character in the set [Yy].
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match ':'.
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a character in the set [^;{}] atomically at least once.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Workers.Activation.BrandingDiscovery.BrandingDiscoveryWorker.GoogleFontRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
fonts\\.googleapis\\.com/css[^"']*family=([^"'&;]+)
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase | RegexOptions.Compiled
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [Ff].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Nn].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match '.'.
○ Match a character in the set [Gg].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo] exactly 2 times.
○ Match a character in the set [Gg].
○ Match a character in the set [Ll].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Pp].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match '.'.
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Mm].
○ Match '/'.
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Ss] exactly 2 times.
○ Match a character in the set [^"'] greedily any number of times.
○ Match a character in the set [Ff].
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Mm].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Ll].
○ Match a character in the set [Yy].
○ Match '='.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a character in the set [^"&';] atomically at least once.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Workers.Activation.BrandingDiscovery.BrandingDiscoveryWorker.FontFaceRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
@font-face\\s*\\{[^}]*font-family\\s*:\\s*["']?([^"';]+)["']?
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase | RegexOptions.Compiled
Explanation:
○ Match '@'.
○ Match a character in the set [Ff].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Nn].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match '-'.
○ Match a character in the set [Ff].
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match '{'.
○ Match a character other than '}' greedily any number of times.
○ Match a character in the set [Ff].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Nn].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match '-'.
○ Match a character in the set [Ff].
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Mm].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Ll].
○ Match a character in the set [Yy].
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match ':'.
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ Match a character in the set ["'] greedily, optionally.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a character in the set [^"';] greedily at least once.
○ Match a character in the set ["'] atomically, optionally.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Workers.Activation.BrandingDiscovery.BrandingDiscoveryWorker.ThemeColorMetaRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
<meta[^>]+name\\s*=\\s*["']theme-color["'][^>]*content\\s*=\\s*["']([^"']+)["']
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase | RegexOptions.Compiled
Explanation:
○ Match '<'.
○ Match a character in the set [Mm].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character other than '>' greedily at least once.
○ Match a character in the set [Nn].
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Mm].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match '='.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match a character in the set ["'].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a character in the set [Hh].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Mm].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match '-'.
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Ll].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Rr].
○ Match a character in the set ["'].
○ Match a character other than '>' greedily any number of times.
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Nn].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Nn].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match '='.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match a character in the set ["'].
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a character in the set [^"'] atomically at least once.
○ Match a character in the set ["'].

member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ColorPropertyRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ColorPropertyRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ColorPropertyRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ColorPropertyRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_defaultTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_ascii_C40000080000000000000000
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "\"&';".

member.summary: Supports searching for the specified strings.

member.summary: Supports searching for the string "@font-face".
